title: Port has_advanced_since_error
description: Port has_advanced_since_error to stack.go. Walk primary link chain checking for non-zero-width subtrees since last error. Integrate into recover() to gate summary re-recording. Include unit tests. Reference: C ts_stack_has_advanced_since_error in stack.c.
close_reason: Already implemented on main. HasAdvancedSinceError in stack.go:240-268, integrated in parser.go:409 (external scanner empty token rejection), 4 unit tests in stack_test.go.
